历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category (including former Science Category) were 3487 → 11489 → 10285 → 8997 → 9014 respectively. After a significant drop in 2022, the rankings have been relatively stable in the 9000-10300 range for the past three years, with a baseline of approximately 9014 in 2025. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for Physics Category was 6 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 4 students in 2024-2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 12 students, a 200% increase compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure, and the ranking is expected to drop significantly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. The main ranking of Soft Science has been continuously rising from 93rd in 2021 to 81st in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years, enhancing the university's comprehensive strength. In 2022, there was a negative reputation due to a teacher ethics incident. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed. The overall ranking on Douyin is 49th, with an evaluation of relatively hot. No obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded. Foreign Language and Literature is an A+ discipline (top national level), but the majors recruited under Physics Category (Management Science and Engineering, Educational Technology, Law, Business Administration, Journalism and Communication, Chinese International Education) have a general correlation with the core language advantage.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Management Science and Engineering has stable popularity; Business Administration was notably discouraged in 2023; Journalism and Communication was notably discouraged in 2023. In 2026, the total number of examinees in this province is 218,700, an increase of approximately 21.6% compared to 2025, with an estimated 147,710 Physics Category examinees, intensifying competition. The university is located in Shanghai (not in this province), with Gansu enrollment accounting for about 1.62% in 2021, showing no local protection tendency. Shanghai, as a first-tier city, still has some appeal to western examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan by 200% (main reason for ranking drop), the increase in provincial examinees by about 21.6% (intensified competition), the continuous rise in university ranking (increased attractiveness), and the general correlation between Physics Category majors and core advantageous disciplines, with positive effects from the expansion of examinee scale and university ranking improvement, a slight forward adjustment is made. The predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 19731, with a range of 19231-20231.

- Law
- Journalism and Communication (Outstanding International Journalism and Communication Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)

- Business Administration (Outstanding Management Talent Program).

- Chinese International Education.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Physics Category significantly expands to 12 students (200% increase from 2025), with rankings expected to drop significantly, predicted range 19231-20231. For rankings within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, with Tier 1 as a reach and Tier 3 as safety. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit (<19231), try Law, Journalism and Communication. For rankings near the upper limit (>20231), it is recommended to use Educational Technology and Chinese International Education as safety.
